_comment: Pre-generated fixture for the /p/linkedin-roaster demo sample input. If the user submits the exact sample profile text, main.py returns this blob in under 500ms. Any other input falls through to Gemini or deterministic dry-run.

roast.observation: The profile leads with building several AI products, but the clearest buyer promise is buried behind project names.
roast.sting: Strong operator signal, but the headline makes the reader do the positioning work.

roast.observation: There is a lot of founder energy across OpenChat, OpenPaper, and Floom, yet the through-line is not immediately explicit.
roast.sting: The profile has proof; it just needs a sharper spine.

roast.observation: The experience reads like a rapid shipping log, but the business outcomes need more numbers and before-after contrast.
roast.sting: Velocity is impressive; quantified impact is what makes it undeniable.

rewrites.original_excerpt: Founder building AI products across Floom, OpenChat, and OpenPaper.
rewrites.rewritten: Founder building AI-native workflow products that turn prototypes into production tools
rewrites.why_better: It keeps the founder signal while explaining the category and buyer value in one scan.

rewrites.original_excerpt: I build and ship AI products quickly across chat, research, and deployment workflows.
rewrites.rewritten: I build AI products for operators who need working software, not demos: fast prototypes, production hosting, and agent-ready workflows.
rewrites.why_better: It names the customer, the pain, and the concrete product promise.

rewrites.original_excerpt: Built multiple AI applications and launch systems from idea to production.
rewrites.rewritten: Built and launched multiple AI workflow products from prototype to production, covering app hosting, agent access, and repeatable launch operations.
rewrites.why_better: It turns activity into a fuller scope of ownership and shows why the work matters.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/federicodepo.top_tip: Make the headline say the market category and the buyer outcome before listing product names.

roast.observation: You open with "Passionate innovation leader" and "unlock synergy", which reads like a buzzword bundle instead of a role value statement.
roast.sting: If your headline could fit 5,000 profiles, it is not a positioning advantage.

roast.observation: In About, "wearing many hats" and "thinking outside the box" are generic claims with zero proof.
roast.sting: Recruiters do not hire adjectives, they hire evidence.

roast.observation: Your Acme bullet says "owned roadmap execution" and "improved collaboration" but gives no measurable before-and-after.
roast.sting: Without numbers, this sounds like participation, not impact.

roast.observation: "Drove AI initiatives and created dashboards used across the business" names activity, not business outcome.
roast.sting: Shipping outputs is nice; showing business lift gets interviews.

rewrites.original_excerpt: Passionate innovation leader | Helping companies unlock synergy with AI and data.
rewrites.rewritten: Senior Product Manager | Turn AI strategy into shipped products and measurable business outcomes
rewrites.why_better: It replaces vague motivation language with role clarity and concrete value.

rewrites.original_excerpt: I am a results-driven professional with 10+ years of experience across strategy, product, and operations.
rewrites.rewritten: Over 10 years in product leadership, I ship cross-functional programs that cut decision latency and improve delivery reliability.
rewrites.why_better: It keeps tenure but adds specific outcomes instead of broad self-description.

rewrites.original_excerpt: Owned roadmap execution, managed cross-functional teams, improved collaboration, and supported leadership priorities.
rewrites.rewritten: Led roadmap execution across product, design, and engineering, reducing cycle time and aligning delivery to top leadership goals.
rewrites.why_better: It upgrades a task list into an action-plus-impact bullet that sounds senior and accountable.

e34bc51f57f451cbb559b1cf253e02b7b782adc9.top_tip: Replace every generic claim with one concrete, quantified outcome so your profile reads credible in a 10-second skim.

_debug.canonical: {"profile_text":"Headline: Passionate innovation leader | Helping companies unlock synergy with AI and data. About: I am a results-driven professional with 10+ years of experience across strategy, product, and operations. I love wearing many hats, thinking outside the box, and driving digital transformation initiatives that move the needle. I have successfully collaborated cross-functionally with stakeholders at all levels and consistently delivered high-quality solutions in fast-paced environments. Experience: Senior Product Manager at Acme Corp (2022-Present) - Owned roadmap execution, managed cross-functional teams, improved collaboration, and supported leadership priorities. Drove AI initiatives and created dashboards used across the business. Experience: Product Manager at Northstar Labs (2019-2022) - Worked on multiple strategic projects, partnered with engineering and design, and improved internal processes to increase efficiency."}
